violations.text: At the time of inspection, food items in the retail reach-in refrigeration were observed held at 42 to 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per the PIC, a workorder ticket is in place for the freezer units. PIC is to include refrigeration on workorder for any necessary adjustments. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The walk-in freezer was observed to have an accumulation of ice build-up on the floor. Per the PIC, a workorder is in place for thawing of the walk-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
Old rodent droppings were observed on the floor near the mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023
